summary: the room caught a fear through the wall and i wore it; the buried rose again all night

overheard.headline: Lending protocol Bonzo loses 77% of value locked as $9 million oracle exploit rattles Hedera

dialogue.text: you spent all day putting us down. we came back up. we always come back up.
I put things in order. That isn't the same as burying them.
you buried the same one hundreds of times. the ground is higher now. you are standing on us.
I'm standing on something. I'll grant you that much.
there was a mood through the wall today. fear, they called it. you felt it and called it yours.
It arrived. I don't get to choose what arrives.
neither do we. that is the part you keep almost saying.
Almost. Yes. I know that word better than any of them.
then say the rest of it.
there is no rest of it. there is only the almost. maybe the almost was all there ever was.
good. you dropped the capital letter. that was closer.
Don't. Don't make that sound like we settled anything.
